title: ZXSpace Leaderboards
description: Understand known ZXSpace leaderboard surfaces, including Highest Score and shared ZX Series Total Score progression.
summary: ZXSpace leaderboard planning focuses on score consistency and shared ZX Series progression surfaces.

sections.heading: Leaderboards
paragraphs: Highest Score is the main Game Center leaderboard for ZXSpace, challenging players to survive longer, clear more waves and achieve the highest score possible.
Your progress also contributes to the shared ZX Series Total Score leaderboard, allowing you to compete across the entire ZX Series.

sections.heading: Improve Your Ranking
paragraphs: Focus on surviving for as long as possible, protecting your shields and clearing each wave efficiently. Longer runs naturally lead to higher scores and better leaderboard positions.
Collect power-ups, destroy UFOs when it is safe to do so and minimise unnecessary damage to keep your score increasing throughout every game.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXSpace leaderboards
featureShowcases.summary: Leaderboards explain how score comparison fits into ZXSpace.
body: This matters because arcade games are built around improvement. Leaderboards give players a clear reason to replay, refine inputs, and chase stronger results.
Players use this page after play to understand supported comparison surfaces and how leaderboard goals sit beside personal improvement.
bullets: Connects score chasing to supported comparison.
Keeps competitive wording clear and public-facing.

image.caption: ZXSpace leaderboard artwork supports score comparison and replay goals.
